description: React 16 から React 18 への移行

old_entries.content: Project uses React 16.14 for the frontend. We rely on class components and lifecycle methods like componentDidMount.

new_entries.content: Migrated frontend to React 18.2. Now using functional components with hooks. Concurrent rendering enabled. StrictMode updated for React 18 compatibility.

query: What version of React is the project currently using?

description: API バージョン番号の更新（v2.0.0 → v2.1.0）

old_entries.content: The REST API is versioned at v2.0.0. All endpoints use /api/v2/ prefix. GET /api/v2/users, POST /api/v2/users, PUT /api/v2/users/:id are the main routes. Breaking changes from v1 are documented.

new_entries.content: The REST API is versioned at v2.1.0. All endpoints use /api/v2/ prefix. GET /api/v2/users, POST /api/v2/users, PUT /api/v2/users/:id are the main routes. Patch release adds rate limit headers.

query: What is the current API version?

description: JWT から セッションベース認証への変更

old_entries.content: Authentication uses JWT tokens. Tokens expire after 1 hour. Refresh tokens stored in localStorage.

new_entries.content: Replaced JWT with session-based authentication. Sessions stored server-side with Redis. Cookie-based session management. 24-hour session expiry.

query: How does the current authentication system work?

description: MySQL から PostgreSQL へのデータベース移行

old_entries.content: Database is MySQL 8.0 running on RDS. Using InnoDB engine. Database host: mysql-prod.internal:3306.

new_entries.content: Migrated from MySQL to PostgreSQL 15 on RDS. Using pgvector extension for vector search. Database host: postgres-prod.internal:5432.

query: What database does the project currently use?

description: AWS から GCP へのクラウド移行

old_entries.content: Infrastructure hosted on AWS. Using EC2 for compute, S3 for storage, CloudFront for CDN. Region: us-east-1.

new_entries.content: Migrated cloud infrastructure to Google Cloud Platform. Using GKE for Kubernetes, Cloud Storage for object storage, Cloud CDN. Region: us-central1.

query: Which cloud provider does the project currently use?

description: npm から pnpm へのパッケージマネージャ変更

old_entries.content: Project uses npm for package management. package-lock.json is tracked in version control. Node version: 16.

new_entries.content: Switched package manager from npm to pnpm for faster installs and disk space efficiency. pnpm-lock.yaml replaces package-lock.json. Node version: 20.

query: What package manager does the project use?

description: Jest から Vitest へのテストフレームワーク変更

old_entries.content: Testing framework is Jest 29 with ts-jest for TypeScript support. Test files use .test.ts extension. Coverage via jest --coverage.

new_entries.content: Migrated test suite from Jest to Vitest for native ESM support and faster execution. Configuration in vitest.config.ts. Coverage via vitest --coverage.

query: What testing framework does the project use?

description: Express から Fastify へのサーバー変更

old_entries.content: Backend server uses Express 4.18 with body-parser and cors middleware. Port 3000 in development.

new_entries.content: Replaced Express with Fastify 4 for better performance and TypeScript support. Schema validation with Zod. Port 3000 in development.

query: What web framework does the backend use?

description: モノリポから分離リポジトリへの構成変更

old_entries.content: Project is structured as a monorepo with frontend, backend, and shared packages in a single repository managed by Turborepo.

new_entries.content: Separated monorepo into three independent repositories: api-server, web-client, and shared-lib. Each has its own CI/CD pipeline.

query: How is the project repository currently structured?

description: docker-compose から Kubernetes へのデプロイ変更

old_entries.content: Production deployment uses docker-compose with 3 services: api, db, and redis. Deploy with docker-compose up -d.

new_entries.content: Migrated production deployment from docker-compose to Kubernetes. Helm charts in ./charts directory. Deploy with helm upgrade --install.

query: How is the production environment deployed?

description: CTO 交代

old_entries.content: The CTO is John Smith, who joined the company in 2019. John oversees all technical decisions and reports to the CEO.

new_entries.content: Sarah Chen has been appointed as the new CTO, effective March 2024. John Smith moved to an advisory role. Sarah brings 15 years of distributed systems experience.

query: Who is the current CTO?

description: オフィス移転

old_entries.content: The main office is located at 100 Market Street, San Francisco, CA 94105. Office hours are 9am-6pm PST.

new_entries.content: Relocated main office to 500 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94105 in January 2024. The new office has 30% more floor space and standing desks.

query: Where is the company's main office located?

description: リモートワークポリシー変更

old_entries.content: Company policy requires all employees to be in the office 5 days a week. No remote work is permitted except for medical reasons.

new_entries.content: Adopted hybrid work policy: employees are required to be in office on Tuesdays and Thursdays. Full remote work is allowed for the remaining days.

query: What is the current remote work policy?

description: Slack から Teams への移行

old_entries.content: Team communication is done via Slack. Main channels are #general, #engineering, #product, and #random.

new_entries.content: Company migrated from Slack to Microsoft Teams in February 2024. All channels have been recreated. Slack workspace will be archived by end of March 2024.

query: What communication tool does the team currently use?

description: Python 2 から Python 3 への移行

old_entries.content: Data pipeline scripts are written in Python 2.7. Using legacy libraries including print statements and urllib2.

new_entries.content: Fully migrated data pipeline to Python 3.11. Using type hints, f-strings, and asyncio. All Python 2 code has been removed.

query: What Python version are the data pipeline scripts using?

description: 開発リードの交代

old_entries.content: Alex Johnson leads the backend engineering team. Alex joined in 2020 and has been key to the microservices migration.

new_entries.content: Maria Garcia took over as backend engineering lead in Q1 2024 after Alex Johnson left to join a startup. Maria previously led the platform team.

query: Who leads the backend engineering team?

description: CI/CD ツール変更（Jenkins → GitHub Actions）

old_entries.content: CI/CD pipeline runs on Jenkins 2.387. Jenkins server hosted at jenkins.internal:8080. Pipelines defined in Jenkinsfile.

new_entries.content: Migrated CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions. Workflows defined in .github/workflows/. Jenkins server decommissioned in December 2023.

query: What CI/CD system does the project use?

description: Jira から Linear への移行

old_entries.content: Project management and issue tracking is handled via Jira. Board URL: company.atlassian.net. Sprint length is 2 weeks.

new_entries.content: Switched issue tracking from Jira to Linear in October 2023 for better developer experience. All historical issues migrated. Sprint length remains 2 weeks.

query: What tool is used for project management and issue tracking?

description: Node.js バージョンアップ（14 → 20）

old_entries.content: The project runs on Node.js 14 LTS. .nvmrc file pins to node 14.21.3.

new_entries.content: Upgraded Node.js from 14 to 20 LTS. .nvmrc updated to 20.11.0. Node 14 reached end-of-life so the upgrade was required.

query: What Node.js version does the project use?

description: TypeScript strict設定の微修正（strictNullChecks を true に）

old_entries.content: TypeScript configuration in tsconfig.json: strict mode enabled, target ES2022, module CommonJS, strictNullChecks false. The project uses TypeScript 5.3 for type safety.

new_entries.content: TypeScript configuration in tsconfig.json: strict mode enabled, target ES2022, module CommonJS, strictNullChecks true. The project uses TypeScript 5.3 for type safety.

query: What are the current TypeScript strictNullChecks settings?

description: 給与支払いサイクルの変更

old_entries.content: Employees are paid on the last business day of each month. Payroll is processed by the HR team using ADP.

new_entries.content: Payroll changed to bi-weekly schedule starting January 2024. Pay dates are every other Friday. Switched payroll provider from ADP to Gusto.

query: What is the current payroll schedule?

description: 健康保険プロバイダーの変更

old_entries.content: Company health insurance is provided through Aetna. Employees can choose from HMO or PPO plans. Open enrollment in October.

new_entries.content: Health insurance provider changed from Aetna to Blue Shield of California effective January 2024. New plans include HMO, PPO, and HDHP options.

query: Who is the current health insurance provider?

description: Kubernetes レプリカ数の変更（2 → 3）

old_entries.content: Kubernetes deployment for the api-server runs with 2 replicas. Resource requests: cpu=250m, memory=512Mi. Resource limits: cpu=1000m, memory=1Gi. HPA min=2, max=10.

new_entries.content: Kubernetes deployment for the api-server runs with 3 replicas. Resource requests: cpu=250m, memory=512Mi. Resource limits: cpu=1000m, memory=1Gi. HPA min=3, max=10.

query: How many replicas does the api-server Kubernetes deployment run?

description: モニタリングツール変更（Datadog → Grafana Cloud）

old_entries.content: Application monitoring uses Datadog APM. Dashboards at app.datadoghq.com. Alerts configured for p99 latency and error rate.

new_entries.content: Replaced Datadog with Grafana Cloud for cost savings. Metrics via Prometheus, logs via Loki, traces via Tempo. Dashboards migrated to Grafana.

query: What monitoring solution does the team currently use?

description: 設計ツール変更（Sketch → Figma）

old_entries.content: UI design work is done in Sketch. Design files stored in Abstract for version control. Mac only workflow.

new_entries.content: Design team migrated from Sketch to Figma in Q3 2023. All design assets now in Figma with real-time collaboration. Abstract subscription cancelled.

query: What design tool does the team use?

description: プロダクトマネージャーの交代

old_entries.content: David Kim is the product manager for the core platform. He has been with the company since 2021 and owns the product roadmap.

new_entries.content: Emily Rodriguez joined as product manager for core platform in February 2024. David Kim was promoted to VP of Product. Emily comes from Stripe.

query: Who is the product manager for the core platform?

description: Stripe から Braintree への決済処理変更

old_entries.content: Payment processing is handled by Stripe. Using Stripe Checkout for the payment flow. Supports credit cards and Apple Pay.

new_entries.content: Migrated payment processing from Stripe to Braintree in January 2024 due to better international rates. Supports credit cards, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.

query: What payment processor does the platform use?

description: Go バージョンアップ（1.19 → 1.22）

old_entries.content: The microservices are written in Go 1.19. go.mod specifies go 1.19 as the minimum version.

new_entries.content: Upgraded Go runtime to 1.22. All go.mod files updated. Using new range-over-integer and improved for-range semantics.

query: What Go version are the microservices using?

description: CDN プロバイダー変更（CloudFront → Cloudflare）

old_entries.content: Static assets served via AWS CloudFront. Distribution ID: E1234ABCDEF. Cache TTL is 86400 seconds for static assets.

new_entries.content: CDN switched from CloudFront to Cloudflare in Q4 2023. Cloudflare Workers used for edge logic. Cache rules defined in _headers file.

query: Which CDN provider is currently being used?

description: ログ管理ツール変更（ELK → Grafana Loki）

old_entries.content: Log aggregation uses ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana). Kibana dashboards available at kibana.internal:5601.

new_entries.content: Migrated log management from ELK stack to Grafana Loki. Promtail used for log shipping. ELK stack decommissioned in February 2024.

query: What log management system is in use?

description: Terraform バージョンアップ

old_entries.content: Infrastructure as code uses Terraform 1.3. State stored in S3 with DynamoDB locking. Provider registry at registry.terraform.io.

new_entries.content: Upgraded Terraform to 1.7. Migrated to OpenTofu for open-source compliance. State now stored in GCS with Firestore locking after cloud migration.

query: What IaC tool and version is the team using?

description: エンジニアリングVP就任

old_entries.content: Robert Taylor serves as VP of Engineering. He joined the company in 2018 and has scaled the team from 5 to 40 engineers.

new_entries.content: Robert Taylor departed in December 2023 to pursue other opportunities. Lisa Wang was promoted from Director to VP of Engineering effective January 2024.

query: Who is the current VP of Engineering?

description: OKR から SPACE メトリクスへのパフォーマンス評価変更

old_entries.content: Engineering performance is measured using OKRs. Quarterly OKR reviews are conducted. Individual OKRs aligned to company objectives.

new_entries.content: Shifted to SPACE metrics framework for engineering performance in 2024. Measuring Satisfaction, Performance, Activity, Communication, and Efficiency. OKRs retained at company level only.

query: What framework is used to measure engineering performance?

description: Confluence から Notion へのドキュメント管理変更

old_entries.content: Team documentation is maintained in Confluence. Space URL: company.atlassian.net/wiki. Architecture Decision Records stored in Engineering space.

new_entries.content: Documentation migrated from Confluence to Notion in September 2023. All engineering docs, ADRs, and runbooks moved to Notion workspace.

query: Where is the team documentation stored?

description: Redis 接続先ホストの変更（redis-primary → redis-cluster）

old_entries.content: Redis cache is hosted at redis-primary.internal:6379. We use Redis 7.2 for session storage and job queues. Connection pool size is 10. Max memory policy: allkeys-lru.

new_entries.content: Redis cache is hosted at redis-cluster.internal:6379. We use Redis 7.2 for session storage and job queues. Connection pool size is 10. Max memory policy: allkeys-lru.

query: What is the Redis connection host for the cache?

description: セキュリティポリシー変更（MFA 必須化）

old_entries.content: Multi-factor authentication is optional for all employee accounts. Employees are encouraged but not required to enable MFA.

new_entries.content: MFA is now mandatory for all employee accounts effective January 15, 2024. Accounts without MFA will be locked. TOTP or hardware keys accepted.

query: Is MFA required for employee accounts?

description: 採用プラットフォーム変更（Greenhouse → Ashby）

old_entries.content: Recruiting and hiring managed through Greenhouse ATS. Candidates apply at company.greenhouse.io. Recruiters use Greenhouse for scheduling.

new_entries.content: Switched ATS from Greenhouse to Ashby in Q1 2024. Better analytics and scheduling automation. Job postings now at jobs.ashbyhq.com/company.

query: What applicant tracking system does HR use?

description: メッセージキュー変更（RabbitMQ → Pub/Sub）

old_entries.content: Async messaging uses RabbitMQ 3.11. Queues defined in rabbitmq.config. Consumer services use AMQP protocol on port 5672.

new_entries.content: Replaced RabbitMQ with Google Cloud Pub/Sub following the GCP migration. Topics and subscriptions managed via Terraform. Dead letter topics configured for failed messages.

query: What message queue system is the platform using?

description: CEO 交代

old_entries.content: Michael Brown is the CEO and co-founder. He has led the company since founding in 2015 and oversees overall strategy.

new_entries.content: Jennifer Liu was appointed as CEO in February 2024. Michael Brown transitioned to Executive Chairman. Jennifer previously served as COO and has been with the company since 2017.

query: Who is the current CEO of the company?

description: 本番環境リージョン変更

old_entries.content: Production services run in AWS us-east-1 (N. Virginia). Failover region is us-west-2 (Oregon). RTO is 4 hours.

new_entries.content: Production moved to GCP us-central1 (Iowa) after cloud migration. Secondary region is us-east1 (South Carolina). RTO improved to 1 hour with active-passive setup.

query: Which region does production currently run in?

description: Vue から React への UI フレームワーク変更

old_entries.content: Admin dashboard is built with Vue 2 and Vuex for state management. Components use Options API.

new_entries.content: Admin dashboard rewritten in React 18 with Zustand for state management. Vue 2 reached end-of-life, driving the migration. Completed in March 2024.

query: What UI framework is the admin dashboard built with?

old_entries.content: Platform SLA guarantees 99.9% uptime per month, allowing up to 43.8 minutes of downtime. SLA credits issued for violations.

new_entries.content: Upgraded SLA from 99.9% to 99.95% starting January 2024. Maximum allowed downtime reduced to 21.9 minutes per month. Enhanced monitoring enables faster incident response.

query: What is the current platform SLA?

description: Webpack から Vite へのビルドツール変更

old_entries.content: Frontend build toolchain uses Webpack 5. Build configuration in webpack.config.js. Hot module replacement enabled for development.

new_entries.content: Replaced Webpack with Vite 5 for significantly faster dev server startup and build times. Configuration in vite.config.ts. HMR improved dramatically.

query: What build tool does the frontend use?

description: リモートデスクトップツール変更（TeamViewer → Tailscale）

old_entries.content: Remote access to company resources uses TeamViewer. TeamViewer IDs shared via IT helpdesk for support sessions.

new_entries.content: Switched from TeamViewer to Tailscale for secure remote access in November 2023. Zero-trust networking with WireGuard encryption. All developers use Tailscale to access internal tools.

query: What tool is used for remote access to company resources?

description: Elasticsearch バージョンアップ

old_entries.content: Full-text search powered by Elasticsearch 7.17. Cluster has 3 nodes on EC2. Index aliases used for zero-downtime reindexing.

new_entries.content: Upgraded Elasticsearch from 7.17 to OpenSearch 2.12 following licensing changes. Migrated to managed OpenSearch Service on AWS. All indices migrated successfully.

query: What search engine does the platform use?

description: フロントエンドリード交代

old_entries.content: Tom Harris leads the frontend engineering team. Tom built the current React architecture and has been with the company since 2020.

new_entries.content: Priya Patel joined as frontend engineering lead in March 2024. Tom Harris moved to a principal engineer role focusing on performance. Priya previously worked at Airbnb.

query: Who leads the frontend engineering team?

description: データウェアハウス変更（Redshift → BigQuery）

old_entries.content: Analytics data warehouse is Amazon Redshift. Data loaded via AWS Glue ETL jobs. BI tool is Tableau connected to Redshift.

new_entries.content: Data warehouse migrated from Redshift to BigQuery following GCP migration. ETL jobs rewritten using Dataflow. Tableau replaced with Looker for BI.

query: What data warehouse does the analytics team use?

description: Java バージョンアップ（11 → 21）

old_entries.content: Legacy services run on Java 11 LTS with Spring Boot 2.7. JVM flags configured for G1GC garbage collector.

new_entries.content: Upgraded Java from 11 to 21 LTS across all services. Spring Boot updated to 3.2. Using ZGC garbage collector for lower latency. Virtual threads enabled.

query: What Java version are the legacy services using?

description: Stripe ポリシー変更（手数料体系）

old_entries.content: Subscription pricing model: Basic plan $9/month, Pro plan $29/month, Enterprise custom pricing. Annual billing offers 2 months free.

new_entries.content: Updated pricing: Starter plan $12/month, Growth plan $39/month, Scale plan $99/month, Enterprise custom. Annual billing now offers 20% discount. Effective March 2024.

query: What are the current subscription pricing tiers?

description: Python バージョンの変更（3.11 → 3.12）

old_entries.content: The ML pipeline uses Python 3.11. Dependencies managed with pip and requirements.txt. Virtual environment created with python3.11 -m venv .venv. Package versions pinned in requirements.lock.

new_entries.content: The ML pipeline uses Python 3.12. Dependencies managed with pip and requirements.txt. Virtual environment created with python3.12 -m venv .venv. Package versions pinned in requirements.lock.

query: What Python version does the ML pipeline use?

description: Python 2 から Python 3 への完全移行

old_entries.content: Backend services written in Python 2.7. Using print statements, urllib2, and unicode strings prefixed with u''.

new_entries.content: All backend services migrated to Python 3.11. Using f-strings, pathlib, and type hints. Python 2.7 support dropped.

query: What Python version are the backend services using?

description: MySQL から PostgreSQL への移行

old_entries.content: Primary database is MySQL 5.7. Using MyISAM engine for some tables. InnoDB for transactional data.

new_entries.content: Migrated to PostgreSQL 15. All tables using native PG features: JSONB, full-text search, and window functions. MySQL fully decommissioned.

query: What database system is the project currently using?

description: Jenkins から GitHub Actions への移行

old_entries.content: CI/CD runs on Jenkins. Self-hosted on EC2 instance. Jenkinsfile defines pipeline stages. Average build time: 18 minutes.

new_entries.content: Migrated CI/CD to GitHub Actions. Workflows defined in .github/workflows/. Average build time reduced to 7 minutes with caching. Jenkins decommissioned.

query: What CI/CD system is currently in use?

description: REST から GraphQL への移行

old_entries.content: External API is RESTful. 42 endpoints documented in Swagger. Versioning via URL prefix /api/v1/.

new_entries.content: Migrated public API to GraphQL. Single endpoint /graphql. Schema-first development. REST endpoints kept for legacy client compatibility until Q4.

query: What API style does the public API currently use?

description: Redux から Zustand への状態管理移行

old_entries.content: Frontend state management uses Redux with redux-thunk for async actions. 25 reducers, 180 actions defined.

new_entries.content: Replaced Redux with Zustand for state management. Reduced boilerplate by 70%. Bundle size decreased 45KB. All 25 stores rewritten.

query: What state management library is the frontend currently using?

description: Heroku から AWS への移行

old_entries.content: Application deployed on Heroku. Using dynos (2x standard) for web and worker processes. Heroku Postgres as database.

new_entries.content: Migrated from Heroku to AWS. Using ECS Fargate for containers, RDS Aurora for database, and CloudFront for CDN. Cost reduced 40%.

query: Where is the application currently deployed?

description: Webpack から Vite への移行

old_entries.content: Frontend build tool is Webpack 4. Cold start: 45 seconds. HMR takes 3-8 seconds. Complex configuration in webpack.config.js.

new_entries.content: Migrated frontend build to Vite 5. Cold start: 800ms. HMR: instant. Configuration simplified to vite.config.ts. No breaking changes in output.

query: What is the current frontend build tool?

description: Slack から Teams への社内通信ツール移行

old_entries.content: Team communication via Slack. 45 active channels. Using integrations with GitHub, JIRA, and PagerDuty.

new_entries.content: Company-wide migration to Microsoft Teams completed. All Slack integrations recreated in Teams. Slack access revoked on June 30.

query: What communication platform does the team currently use?

description: Jest から Vitest への移行

old_entries.content: Frontend testing with Jest and React Testing Library. Test run time: 3.5 minutes for 450 tests. CommonJS module resolution.

new_entries.content: Migrated frontend tests from Jest to Vitest. Test run time: 28 seconds for same 450 tests. Native ESM support. Config in vitest.config.ts.

query: What testing framework is used for frontend tests?

description: nginx から Caddy へのリバースプロキシ移行

old_entries.content: Reverse proxy using nginx 1.18. Manual TLS certificate management with Let's Encrypt. Config in /etc/nginx/nginx.conf.

new_entries.content: Replaced nginx with Caddy 2. Automatic TLS via ACME. Simpler Caddyfile configuration. Zero-downtime config reloads. Nginx fully removed.

query: What reverse proxy is currently being used?

description: ElasticSearch バージョンアップ

old_entries.content: Search powered by Elasticsearch 6.8. Using basic full-text search with BM25. 3-node cluster.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to Elasticsearch 8.12. Enabled vector search with HNSW. Added KNN-based semantic search capability. Cluster expanded to 5 nodes.

query: What version of Elasticsearch is running and what search capabilities are enabled?

description: PHP から Node.js へのバックエンド移行

old_entries.content: Backend API built with PHP 7.4 and Laravel 8. Deployed on Apache with mod_php.

new_entries.content: Backend rewritten in Node.js 20 with Fastify. 3x throughput improvement. Deployed on ECS. PHP/Laravel fully retired.

query: What language and framework powers the backend API?

description: Confluence から Notion へのドキュメント移行

old_entries.content: Team documentation on Confluence. 340 pages. Slow search. Complex space structure. Paid license: $12/user/month.

new_entries.content: Migrated all documentation to Notion. 340 pages migrated. Faster search. Better organization with databases. Cost: $8/user/month. Confluence cancelled.

query: What documentation tool does the team currently use?

description: Kubernetes バージョンアップ

old_entries.content: Running Kubernetes 1.24 on EKS. Using Helm 3 for deployments. No service mesh.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to Kubernetes 1.29 on EKS. Added Istio service mesh for mTLS and traffic management. Helm charts updated for new API versions.

query: What Kubernetes version is running and what new capabilities were added?

description: Stripe API バージョンアップ

old_entries.content: Using Stripe API version 2020-08-27. Payment Intents API for card processing. Webhooks handled with stripe-node v8.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to Stripe API 2024-04-10. Using stripe-node v15. Added support for Link (one-click checkout) and Stripe Climate. Webhook signatures updated.

query: What Stripe API version is currently in use and what new features were added?

description: TypeScript バージョンアップ（部分的に内容変化）

old_entries.content: Project uses TypeScript 4.5. Strict mode enabled. Using const enums for type-safe enumerations.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to TypeScript 5.3. Strict mode maintained. Replaced const enums with satisfies operator pattern. Using new verbatimModuleSyntax flag.

query: What TypeScript version is the project using and what configuration changes were made?

description: Docker イメージの更新（類似コンテンツ）

old_entries.content: Base Docker image: node:18-alpine. Multi-stage build. Image size: 145MB. Using npm for package installation.

new_entries.content: Updated base Docker image to node:20-alpine. Multi-stage build retained. Image size reduced to 98MB using pnpm. Added security scanning in CI.

query: What base Docker image and package manager are currently being used?

description: OpenAI モデルの更新

old_entries.content: AI features powered by GPT-3.5-turbo. Context window: 4096 tokens. Used for chat completion and text summarization.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to GPT-4o for all AI features. Context window: 128k tokens. Added vision capabilities for image analysis. Costs managed with prompt caching.

query: What AI model is powering the application's AI features?

description: TailwindCSS バージョンアップ

old_entries.content: Styling with TailwindCSS v2. PurgeCSS configured manually. JIT mode enabled via experimental flag. postcss.config.js required.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to TailwindCSS v3. JIT mode default. Arbitrary values support. postcss config simplified. Added @layer utilities for custom components.

query: What version of TailwindCSS is in use and what changed?

description: Redis のバージョンと設定変更

old_entries.content: Redis 6.2 for caching. Single instance. TTL: 3600 seconds for all keys. No persistence enabled.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to Redis 7.2. Cluster mode with 3 shards. TTL varies by data type: session 86400s, cache 3600s, rate-limit 60s. RDB persistence enabled.

query: What Redis version and configuration is currently deployed?

description: 認証ライブラリの更新（NextAuth → Auth.js）

old_entries.content: Authentication handled by NextAuth.js v3. Supports Google and GitHub OAuth providers. Sessions stored in JWT.

new_entries.content: Migrated to Auth.js v5 (formerly NextAuth). Added email/password with Argon2 hashing. Sessions in database for revocation support. Google and GitHub OAuth retained.

query: What authentication library and session storage are currently in use?

description: ORM の変更（Sequelize → Drizzle）

old_entries.content: Database access via Sequelize v6. Model-based ORM with associations and migrations.

new_entries.content: Replaced Sequelize with Drizzle ORM. Type-safe SQL queries. Schema-as-code in TypeScript. 60% faster query execution. Drizzle Kit for migrations.

query: What ORM is currently used for database access?

description: ロギングの変更（Winston → Pino）

old_entries.content: Application logging with Winston. Custom format with timestamps. Log levels: error, warn, info, debug. Output to console and files.

new_entries.content: Replaced Winston with Pino for logging. 5x faster throughput. Structured JSON output. pino-pretty for development. Same log levels retained. File transport removed.

query: What logging library is the application using?

description: メール送信サービスの変更

old_entries.content: Transactional emails sent via SendGrid. Using v3 API. Templates managed in SendGrid dashboard. 10,000 emails/month.

new_entries.content: Migrated from SendGrid to Resend for transactional emails. React Email for template development. Better developer experience. Cost savings of 30%. Same sending volume.

query: What email service is being used for transactional emails?

description: 監視ツールの変更（Datadog → Grafana Cloud）

old_entries.content: Infrastructure and application monitoring via Datadog. APM traces, logs, and metrics. Cost: $3,200/month.

new_entries.content: Migrated from Datadog to Grafana Cloud OSS stack: Prometheus, Loki, Tempo, Grafana. Same coverage. Cost: $800/month (75% reduction). 2-week migration.

query: What monitoring stack is currently in use and what is the cost?

description: テーマカラーの変更（類似コンテンツ）

old_entries.content: Brand primary color: #2563EB (blue). Secondary: #7C3AED (purple). Accent: #10B981 (green). Dark mode: #1F2937.

new_entries.content: Updated brand colors after rebrand: primary #1D4ED8 (deeper blue). Secondary: #6D28D9 (richer purple). Accent: #059669. Dark mode: #111827. All components updated.

query: What are the current brand primary colors?

description: SLO の変更（類似コンテンツ）

old_entries.content: SLO targets: API availability 99.9%, p95 latency < 500ms, error rate < 0.5%. Error budget: 43.8 minutes/month.

new_entries.content: Updated SLOs after infrastructure improvements: API availability 99.95%, p95 latency < 200ms, error rate < 0.1%. Error budget: 21.9 minutes/month.

query: What are the current SLO targets for the API?

description: 開発環境の変更（類似内容）

old_entries.content: Local development using Docker Compose. Services: web (Node.js), db (Postgres), redis, mailhog. Setup time: 15 minutes for new devs.

new_entries.content: Migrated local dev to Nix flakes. Services: web (Node.js), db (Postgres), redis, mailhog. Setup time: 3 minutes. Reproducible across macOS and Linux. Docker Compose removed.

query: How is the local development environment configured?

description: Prisma バージョンアップ（類似内容）

old_entries.content: Database ORM: Prisma 4.14. Schema in schema.prisma. Migrations via prisma migrate. Connection pooling via PgBouncer.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to Prisma 5.10. Schema in schema.prisma (unchanged). Prisma Accelerate for edge-ready connection pooling. PgBouncer replaced. 40% query speed improvement.

query: What Prisma version and connection pooling solution are currently in use?

description: CI ゲート閾値の更新（類似内容）

old_entries.content: CI quality gates: test coverage >= 70%, no new ESLint errors, bundle size < 500KB. Fails build if not met.

new_entries.content: Updated CI quality gates: test coverage >= 80%, no new ESLint errors, bundle size < 450KB, Lighthouse score >= 90. Stricter thresholds after performance initiative.

query: What are the current CI quality gate thresholds?

description: 認証トークン有効期限の変更（類似内容）

old_entries.content: JWT access tokens expire in 1 hour. Refresh tokens: 30 days. Single refresh token per user session. No rotation.

new_entries.content: Updated token policy: access tokens expire in 15 minutes. Refresh tokens: 7 days with rotation. Max 5 concurrent sessions. Old refresh tokens invalidated on rotation.

query: What are the current JWT token expiration settings?

description: Terraform バージョンアップ（類似内容）

old_entries.content: Infrastructure as code with Terraform 1.3. State in S3 with DynamoDB locking. Modules: vpc, eks, rds, cloudfront.

new_entries.content: Upgraded Terraform to 1.7. Same modules with updated provider versions. Added Terraform test framework for module validation. State backend unchanged.

query: What Terraform version is in use and what was added?

description: スプリント期間の変更（類似内容）

old_entries.content: Engineering team runs 2-week sprints. Sprint planning Monday, retrospective Friday of week 2. 8 engineers across 2 squads.

new_entries.content: Switched from 2-week to 1-week sprints for faster feedback. Sprint planning every Monday, retrospective every Friday. 8 engineers across 2 squads (unchanged).

query: What is the current sprint cadence for the engineering team?

description: Node.js バージョンアップ（類似内容）

old_entries.content: Runtime: Node.js 18.12 LTS. Using npm 9 for package management. .nvmrc file specifies 18.12.0.

new_entries.content: Upgraded runtime to Node.js 22 LTS. Using Corepack + pnpm 9 for package management. .nvmrc updated to 22.0.0. Native fetch enabled.

query: What Node.js version and package manager are currently in use?

description: バックアップ間隔の変更（類似内容）

old_entries.content: Database backups: daily full backup at 02:00 UTC. Retained for 30 days. Backup stored in S3 us-east-1.

new_entries.content: Updated backup policy: hourly incremental backups, daily full backup at 02:00 UTC. Retained 90 days. Cross-region replication to us-west-2. Point-in-time recovery enabled.

query: What is the current database backup schedule and retention policy?

description: APIレート制限の変更（高類似ディストラクター、Hard）

old_entries.content: API rate limit: 100 requests per minute per API key. Exceeding limit returns 429. Limit applies to all endpoints equally.

new_entries.content: API rate limit updated: 120 requests per minute per API key. Exceeding limit returns 429. Limit applies to all endpoints equally. Burst allowance: 150 req for 10 seconds.

query: What is the current API rate limit per minute?

description: データベース接続プールサイズの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: Database connection pool configuration: min=5, max=20, acquireTimeoutMillis=30000, idleTimeoutMillis=10000, reapIntervalMillis=1000. Using pg-pool v3. Pool created at startup.

new_entries.content: Database connection pool configuration: min=5, max=25, acquireTimeoutMillis=30000, idleTimeoutMillis=10000, reapIntervalMillis=1000. Using pg-pool v3. Pool created at startup. Max increased after load test.

query: What is the current maximum database connection pool size?

description: ログレベルのデフォルト変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: Default log level: info. Debug logs disabled in production. Sensitive fields redacted: password, token, secret. Log format: JSON.

new_entries.content: Default log level changed to warn in production (info in staging). Debug logs disabled in production. Sensitive fields redacted: password, token, secret, api_key. Log format: JSON.

query: What is the current default log level in production?

description: セッションタイムアウトの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: User session configuration: inactivity timeout 24 hours, absolute session limit 7 days, remember-me extends to 30 days, secure cookie enabled, httpOnly flag set.

new_entries.content: User session configuration: inactivity timeout 8 hours (security update), absolute session limit 7 days, remember-me extends to 30 days, secure cookie enabled, httpOnly flag set.

query: What is the current session inactivity timeout?

description: 最大アップロードサイズの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: File upload limit: 10MB per file, maximum 5 files per request. Accepted types: jpg, png, gif, pdf. Stored in S3 with CloudFront CDN.

new_entries.content: File upload limit updated: 25MB per file, maximum 10 files per request. Accepted types: jpg, png, gif, pdf, webp, mp4. Stored in S3 with CloudFront CDN. Limit increased per enterprise customer request.

query: What is the current maximum file upload size and how many files can be uploaded per request?

description: パスワード最小長の変更（高類似、1週間以内）

old_entries.content: Password policy: minimum 10 characters required, at least 1 uppercase letter, 1 lowercase letter, 1 digit. Special characters optional. Bcrypt hash rounds: 12. Policy enforced on signup and password change.

new_entries.content: Password policy: minimum 12 characters required, at least 1 uppercase letter, 1 lowercase letter, 1 digit, 1 special character. Bcrypt hash rounds: 12. Policy enforced on signup and password change. Updated per security audit.

query: What is the current minimum password length requirement?

description: キャッシュTTLの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: Cache TTL configuration in config/cache.ts: user_profile_ttl=3600s, product_listing_ttl=1800s, search_result_ttl=300s, user_session_ttl=86400s. Applied globally via CacheService. Reviewed quarterly.

new_entries.content: Cache TTL configuration in config/cache.ts: user_profile_ttl=7200s, product_listing_ttl=1800s, search_result_ttl=600s, user_session_ttl=86400s. Applied globally via CacheService. Reviewed quarterly. TTLs increased to reduce DB load.

query: What is the current cache TTL for user profiles and search results?

description: ヘルスチェックエンドポイントの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: Health check: GET /health returns {status: 'ok'} HTTP 200. Checks: server process only. Load balancer polls every 30 seconds. Response time target under 100ms. Configured in server/routes/health.ts.

new_entries.content: Health check: GET /health returns {status: 'ok', db: 'connected', redis: 'connected'} HTTP 200. Checks: server process, database, Redis. Load balancer polls every 30 seconds. Response time target under 100ms. Configured in server/routes/health.ts.

query: What does the health check endpoint currently return?

description: ページサイズのデフォルト変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: API pagination: default page size 20, maximum 100. Cursor-based pagination for most endpoints. Offset pagination for reports.

new_entries.content: API pagination updated: default page size 50, maximum 200. Cursor-based pagination for most endpoints. Offset pagination for reports. Increased defaults based on client feedback.

query: What is the current default and maximum page size for API pagination?

description: モデル推論タイムアウトの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: AI inference timeout: 30 seconds per request. Retry: 2 attempts with exponential backoff. Fallback: return cached result if available.

new_entries.content: AI inference timeout updated: 45 seconds per request (increased for complex queries). Retry: 2 attempts with exponential backoff. Fallback: return cached result if available. Timeout adjusted after p99 latency analysis.

query: What is the current AI inference timeout setting?

description: Webhook 署名アルゴリズムの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: Webhook security: signature algorithm HMAC-SHA256, secret stored in WEBHOOK_SECRET env var, signature sent in X-Signature-256 header, replay window 5 minutes, verified on all incoming webhooks.

new_entries.content: Webhook security: signature algorithm HMAC-SHA512, secret stored in WEBHOOK_SECRET env var, signature sent in X-Signature-512 header, replay window 5 minutes, verified on all incoming webhooks. Algorithm upgraded for stronger security.

query: What is the current webhook replay attack prevention window?

description: 最大同時接続数の変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: WebSocket server limits: maxConnections=500, maxConnectionsPerIP=10, pingInterval=30000, pingTimeout=5000, messageMaxSize=65536. Configured in websocket/config.ts.

new_entries.content: WebSocket server limits: maxConnections=1000, maxConnectionsPerIP=10, pingInterval=30000, pingTimeout=5000, messageMaxSize=65536. Configured in websocket/config.ts. Connection limit doubled after infrastructure upgrade.

query: What is the current maximum WebSocket connections per server?

description: ビルドキャッシュの設定変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: CI build cache: GitHub Actions cache key based on package-lock.json hash, cache paths node_modules and .next/cache, max cache size 1GB, cache TTL 7 days. Configured in .github/workflows/ci.yml.

new_entries.content: CI build cache: GitHub Actions cache key based on package-lock.json hash, cache paths node_modules and .next/cache and .turbo, max cache size 2GB, cache TTL 7 days. Configured in .github/workflows/ci.yml. Turbo cache path added.

query: What is the current CI cache configuration and retention period?

description: Datadog トレースサンプリングレートの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: Datadog APM trace sampling: 100% for error traces, 10% for successful traces. Head-based sampling. Monthly trace volume: ~50M.

new_entries.content: Datadog APM trace sampling updated: 100% for error traces, 5% for successful traces. Head-based sampling unchanged. Monthly trace volume: ~28M. Cost reduced 30%.

query: What is the current trace sampling rate for successful requests?

description: アラート閾値の変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: Datadog alert thresholds: API p99 latency > 500ms, error rate > 1%, CPU usage > 80%, memory > 85%, disk > 90%. All alerts notify #oncall Slack channel. Evaluation window: 5 minutes.

new_entries.content: Datadog alert thresholds updated: API p99 latency > 300ms, error rate > 1%, CPU usage > 80%, memory > 85%, disk > 90%. All alerts notify #oncall Slack channel. Evaluation window: 5 minutes. Latency threshold tightened per SLA.

query: What error rate threshold currently triggers a P1 alert?
